titleStmt.title: SII 17.141: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 141. (A.R. No. 121 of 1904.) TĪRTHANAGARI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Śivāṅkurēśvara temple.
The details of date given are Paṅguṉi 24 in the 9th year. Palaeographically this record may be assigned to the 13th century A.D.

It records the assignment of tolls on a number of articles to god Tiruttiṉainagar. ḍaiyār of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, by the sabhā and nāṭṭār of Āṇḍāgaḷūr-paṟṟu towards the worship and other offerings and procession during the festival to be celebrated in the month of Vaikāśi, terminating on the Vaiśākha day, the day of tīrtham on the seashore and for the oil for the lamp, flowers and other worship and offerings during the twelve days of another festival beginning with Tirunāvukkaraśu-tirunāḷ and terminating on Nāchchiyār-tirunāḷ, for the health of the king (for the recovery of the king ?). The rates of tolls are laid down in the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . śrīmaṟkittikkuRead śrī meykkīrttikku.mel komāṟapaṉmar tiripu
vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇ
ṭu 9Āvatu paṅkuni mātam Irupatān(ta)tiyati nāḷ jeya
ṅkoṇṭacoḻac caturvvedimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār
tiruttiṉainaka(r)ruṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvarateva
kaṉmi kaṇkāṇi karaṇattārkku Āṇṭārkaḷūr paṟṟu Arumo
ḻi tevaṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakku keṭila vāṟṟukku teṟkku na
ṭuvupaṭṭa sabhaiyārum nāṭṭārom vivasthai perumāḷ tirume
ṉikku naṉṟāka Ivvāṇṭu mutal tiruvaiykācit tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa
vum Ittirunāḷ vaikāci vicākatte tirukkaṭalile tīttam prasādikka
vum Ittirunāḷukku Uṭaṟkoṇṭu koṇṭa tirunāvukkaracutevar tirunā
ḷ mutal nācciyār tirunāḷ Aṟutiyāka nāḷ paṉṉiraṇṭukkum Amutupa
ṭi cāttupaṭi tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyiṟṟu
kku Uṭaṟkoḷppaṭikku peṟuvatāka niccayitta nam nāṭṭil vaḻiccāriyai
koḷḷum tuṟaikaḷile talaiccumaikkum Eruttuppotikkum per
Oṉṟukku Iraṇṭāka vanta kācum talaiccumaikku Oṉṟāka vanta kācu peṟa
vum kaṭal karaiyil koyilaṅkāṭiyār vantu koḷḷum paccai miḷa
kum kūṭaikkum Oṉṟāka vanta kācu peṟavum karuvāṭṭu talaiccumaikku
Iraṇṭāka vanta kācu peṟavum karuvāṭṭu Eruttu potikku poti Oṉṟu
kku nālāka vanta kācu peṟavum Ippaṭi peṟumiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.141 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
